import RequestSchema from "@theme/RequestSchema";
import StatusCodes from "@theme/StatusCodes";

import Heading from "@theme/Heading";

<Heading
  as={"h1"}
  className={"openapi__heading"}
  children={"Get All Tickets"}
>
</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"get"}
  path={"/{organisation}/{event}/tickets"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



Returns a list of all tickets for a given organisation and event.

<Heading
  id={"request"}
  as={"h2"}
  className={"openapi-tabs__heading"}
  children={"Request"}
>
</Heading>

<ParamsDetails
  parameters={[{"name":"organisation","in":"path","description":"Organisation slug","required":true,"schema":{"type":"string","title":"organisation"}},{"name":"event","in":"path","description":"Event slug or ID","required":true,"schema":{"type":"string","title":"event"}}]}
>
  
</ParamsDetails>

<RequestSchema
  title={"Body"}
  body={undefined}
>
  
</RequestSchema>

<StatusCodes
  id={undefined}
  label={undefined}
  responses={{"200":{"description":"Returns a list of all tickets.","content":{"application/json":{"schema":{"type":"object","properties":{"tickets":{"type":"array","items":{"type":"object","properties":{"ksuid":{"type":"string","description":"Unique identifier for the ticket"},"name":{"type":"string","description":"Name of the ticket"},"name_on_ticket":{"type":"string","description":"Name to be printed on the ticket"},"customer_email":{"type":"string","description":"Email of the customer who owns the ticket"},"created_at":{"type":"string","format":"date-time","description":"Timestamp when the ticket was created"},"updated_at":{"type":"string","format":"date-time","description":"Timestamp when the ticket was last updated"},"includes":{"type":"array","items":{"type":"string"},"description":"List of items included with the ticket"},"expanded_includes":{"type":"array","items":{"type":"object"},"description":"List of the items included with the ticket"}},"x-internal-group":"tickets","x-internal-path":"_pydantic/models","title":"TicketObject"}}},"x-internal-group":"tickets","x-internal-path":"_pydantic/models","title":"TicketListResponse"}}},"headers":{}},"404":{"description":"No tickets found.","headers":{}},"500":{"description":"Internal server error.","content":{"application/json":{"schema":{"type":"object","properties":{"message":{"type":"string"},"error":{"type":"string"}},"title":"ErrorResponse"}}},"headers":{}}}}
>
  
</StatusCodes>
